title: Evangelion Slot Machine commerical
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Slot Machine commerical             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sat Jan 07, 2012 9:54 pm A very interesting TV commercial for the Evangelion 7 slot machine in Japan. Typical quirky Japanese sense of humor, but stay towards the end for the payoff. [url]http://www.eva7.jp/fujita_movie.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sat Jan 07, 2012 10:15 pm There are other variations, like the ramen version ( http://www.eva7.jp/yamada_movie.html ) or the Yukata version ( http://www.eva7.jp/take_movie.html ) The narration is interesting - "Leading is Langley, then Third Impact, and then Longius... Evangelion is behind and not seems to be trying..."
